infotexts.entitydescription.smground: .45 caliber Full Metal Jacket round, the most basic SMG ammunition, can be loaded into SMG magazines
infotexts.entitydescription.45Blank_VGB: A cartridge with only casing, fragile bullet, and a small primer - deals virtually no damage. Typically used for drills and weapon testing, or for security officers with excess energy to play around with
infotexts.entitydescription.45JHP_VGB: .45 Jacketed Hollow Point round, primarily for unarmored wildlife. Causes high bleeding damage and more likely to stun targets.
infotexts.entitydescription.45AP_VGB: .45 pointed Armor-Piercing round, mainly for light armor targets. Due to bullet length, propellant is slightly reduced, resulting in slightly lower damage than standard rounds.
infotexts.entitydescription.45Exp_VGB: .45 explosive round, average damage but very likely to knock targets off balance. Primarily used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.45Chloralhydrate_VGB: .45 hypodermic round loaded with chloral hydrate - a professional riot control round that not only stuns targets but can knock them unconscious for a short time. More shots = better effect.
infotexts.entitydescription.45Opium_VGB: .45 hypodermic round loaded with medicinal opium solution - not for treating others. Instead, it slowly accumulates opioid overdose in the target, preventing them from using morphine to save themselves
infotexts.entitydescription.45Sufforin_VGB: .45 hypodermic round loaded with Sufforin toxin, slowly accumulates Sufforin in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires sustained fire to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.45Morbusine_VGB: .45 hypodermic round loaded with Morbusine toxin, slowly accumulates Morbusine in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires sustained fire to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.45Cyanide_VGB: .45 hypodermic round loaded with Cyanide toxin, slowly accumulates Cyanide in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires sustained fire to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.45Calyx_VGB: .45 hypodermic round carrying a small amount of Velonaceps Calyx eggs. Theoretically capable of infecting multiple hosts with a single dose, but given most eggs die on impact, actual transmission efficiency is quite luck-dependent.
infotexts.entitydescription.45Physicorium_VGB: .45 alien pointed AP round using Physicorium bullet - uses harder bullet material without sacrificing muzzle velocity. Exceptional armor penetration.
infotexts.entitydescription.45Dementonite_VGB: .45 FMJ round using Dementonite bullet - causes minor gravity disruption in enemies, leading to severe deep tissue damage and inducing psychotic symptoms
infotexts.entitydescription.45Incendium_VGB: .45 explosive round using Incendium bullet - Incendium explosive makes its tissue damage comparable to small grenades
infotexts.entitydescription.45Fulgurium_VGB: Luxurious .45 FMJ round using Fulgurium - causes shock effects, quickly incapacitating targets
infotexts.entitydescription.45ERASER_VGB:
This round is incompatible with any magazine - it can only be loaded directly into the chamber 
Etched on the primer: "Extreme Pragmatism" 
Holding it gives you an ominous feeling 
Best not used indoors
infotexts.entitydescription.38Blank_VGB: .38 caliber cartridge with only casing, fragile bullet, and small primer - deals virtually no damage. Typically used for drills and weapon testing
infotexts.entitydescription.38JHP_VGB: .38 caliber Jacketed Hollow Point round, excellent against unarmored wildlife. Causes high bleeding damage and more likely to stun targets.
infotexts.entitydescription.38AP_VGB: .38 pointed Armor-Piercing round, mainly for light armor targets. Sacrifices some damage for armor penetration
infotexts.entitydescription.38Exp_VGB: .38 explosive round, average damage but very likely to knock targets off balance.
infotexts.entitydescription.38Chloralhydrate_VGB: .38 hypodermic round loaded with chloral hydrate - a professional riot control round that not only stuns targets but can knock them unconscious for a short time. More shots = better effect
infotexts.entitydescription.38Opium_VGB: .38 hypodermic round loaded with medicinal opium solution - not for treating others. Instead, it slowly accumulates opioid overdose in the target, preventing them from using morphine to save themselves
infotexts.entitydescription.38Sufforin_VGB: .38 hypodermic round loaded with Sufforin toxin, slowly accumulates Sufforin in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires sustained fire to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.38Morbusine_VGB: .38 hypodermic round loaded with Morbusine toxin, slowly accumulates Morbusine in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires sustained fire to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.38Cyanide_VGB: .38 hypodermic round loaded with Cyanide toxin, slowly accumulates Cyanide in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires sustained fire to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.38Calyx_VGB: .38 hypodermic round carrying a small amount of Velonaceps Calyx eggs. Theoretically capable of infecting multiple hosts with a single dose, but given most eggs die on impact, actual transmission efficiency is quite luck-dependent
infotexts.entitydescription.38Physicorium_VGB: .38 alien pointed AP round using Physicorium bullet - uses harder bullet material without sacrificing muzzle velocity. Exceptional armor penetration.
infotexts.entitydescription.38Dementonite_VGB: .38 FMJ round using Dementonite bullet - causes minor gravity disruption in enemies, leading to severe deep tissue damage and inducing psychotic symptoms
infotexts.entitydescription.38Incendium_VGB: .38 explosive round using Incendium bullet - Incendium explosive makes its tissue damage comparable to small grenades
infotexts.entitydescription.38Fulgurium_VGB: Luxurious .38 FMJ round using Fulgurium - causes shock effects, quickly incapacitating targets
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Blank_VGB: .30-06 caliber cartridge with only casing, fragile bullet, and small primer - deals virtually no damage. Typically used for drills and weapon testing
infotexts.entitydescription.3006JHP_VGB: .30-06 full-power Jacketed Hollow Point round, excellent against unarmored wildlife. Causes very high bleeding damage and more likely to stun targets
infotexts.entitydescription.3006AP_VGB: .30-06 pointed Armor-Piercing round, mainly for medium armor targets. Sacrifices some damage for superior armor penetration
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Exp_VGB: .30-06 explosive round, high damage mainly for breaching structures and engaging large targets
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Chloralhydrate_VGB: .30-06 hypodermic round loaded with chloral hydrate - a professional riot control round that not only stuns targets but can knock them unconscious for a short time
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Opium_VGB: .30-06 hypodermic round loaded with medicinal opium solution - not for treating others. Instead, it slowly accumulates opioid overdose in the target, preventing them from using morphine to save themselves
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Sufforin_VGB: .30-06 hypodermic round loaded with Sufforin toxin, slowly accumulates Sufforin in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires 4-5 consecutive shots to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Morbusine_VGB: .30-06 hypodermic round loaded with Morbusine toxin, slowly accumulates Morbusine in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires 4-5 consecutive shots to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Cyanide_VGB: .30-06 hypodermic round loaded with Cyanide toxin, slowly accumulates Cyanide in the target. Each round contains minimal toxin - requires 4-5 consecutive shots to take effect
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Calyx_VGB: .30-06 hypodermic round carrying a small amount of Velonaceps Calyx eggs. Theoretically capable of infecting multiple hosts with a single dose, but given most eggs die on impact, actual transmission efficiency is quite luck-dependent\n.30-06 rounds have higher infection probability than .45 rounds
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Physicorium_VGB: .30-06 alien pointed AP round using Physicorium bullet - uses harder bullet material without sacrificing muzzle velocity. Exceptional armor penetration.
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Dementonite_VGB: .30-06 FMJ round using Dementonite bullet - causes minor gravity disruption in enemies, leading to severe deep tissue damage and inducing psychotic symptoms
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Incendium_VGB: .30-06 explosive round using Incendium bullet - Incendium explosive makes its tissue damage comparable to medium grenades
infotexts.entitydescription.3006Fulgurium_VGB: Luxurious .30-06 FMJ round using Fulgurium - causes shock effects, quickly incapacitating targets
infotexts.entitydescription.60Blank_VGB: .60 hand cannon cartridge with only casing, fragile bullet, and small primer - deals virtually no damage. Typically used for drills and weapon testing
infotexts.entitydescription.60JHP_VGB: The .60's already terrifying kinetic energy transfer combined with special hollow point bullets - blowing a bandit's head off should be no problem
infotexts.entitydescription.60AP_VGB: Performance very close to Old Earth's popular .50 BMG round - deals devastating damage to most armored small creatures
infotexts.entitydescription.60Exp_VGB: An explosive surprise in the barrel
infotexts.entitydescription.68Blank_VGB: 6.8mm cartridge with only casing, fragile bullet, and small primer - deals virtually no damage. Typically used for drills and weapon testing
infotexts.entitydescription.68JHP_VGB: 6.8mm Jacketed Hollow Point round, assault rifle standard ammunition. Excellent against unarmored wildlife, causes high bleeding damage
infotexts.entitydescription.68AP_VGB: 6.8mm pointed Armor-Piercing round, mainly for light armor targets
infotexts.entitydescription.68Exp_VGB: 6.8mm explosive round, average damage but very likely to knock targets off balance. Mainly used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.68Rev_VGB: Improved 6.8mm round - "Revolutionary" uses AP-HE warhead + composite overpressure propellant combo, unlocking 6.8mm's potential\nThe only problem: "Revolutionary" causes irreversible damage to assault rifles. Long-term use will eventually destroy the weapon.
infotexts.entitydescription.556Blank_VGB: 5.56mm cartridge with only casing, fragile bullet, and small primer - deals virtually no damage. Typically used for drills and weapon testing
infotexts.entitydescription.556JHP_VGB: 5.56mm machine gun dedicated Jacketed Hollow Point round - low single-shot damage but extremely high rate of fire, suitable for engaging unarmored cluster targets
infotexts.entitydescription.556AP_VGB: 5.56mm machine gun dedicated Armor-Piercing round, mainly for suppressive fire. High rate of fire compensates for limited single-shot armor penetration
infotexts.entitydescription.556Exp_VGB: 5.56mm machine gun dedicated explosive round - limited single-shot power but high rate of fire accumulates explosive effects. Mainly for suppressive fire and breaching
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptySmgMag_VGM: An empty SMG magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagBlank_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.smgmagazine: SMG magazine loaded with .45 FMJ rounds, the most basic ammunition configuration
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagFMJ_VGB: SMG magazine loaded with .45 FMJ rounds, the most basic ammunition configuration
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagJHP_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 JHP rounds, excellent against unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagAP_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 AP rounds, can penetrate light armor
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagExp_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 explosive rounds, can be used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagChloralhydrate_V: SMG magazine loaded with .45 chemical sedative rounds, for riot control and non-lethal takedowns
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagOpium_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 medicinal opium rounds, prevents targets from using morphine to save themselves
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagSufforin_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Sufforin toxin rounds, accumulates Sufforin in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagMorbusine_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Morbusine toxin rounds, accumulates Morbusine in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagCyanide_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Cyanide toxin rounds, accumulates Cyanide in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagCalyx_VGM: .45 SMG magazine carrying small amount of Velonaceps Calyx eggs. Less efficient than direct injection, but can still spread infection
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagPhysicorium_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Physicorium AP rounds, exceptional armor penetration
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagDementonite_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Dementonite gravity rounds, causes deep tissue damage and induces psychosis
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagIncendium_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Incendium HE rounds, tissue damage comparable to small grenades
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgMagFulgurium_VGM: SMG magazine loaded with .45 Fulgurium shock rounds, quickly incapacitates targets
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptySmgLongMag_VGM: An empty SMG extended magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.smgLongmagVGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 FMJ rounds, provides increased ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagBlank_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagJHP_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 JHP rounds, excellent against unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagAP_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 AP rounds, can penetrate light armor
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagExp_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 explosive rounds, can be used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagChloralhydra: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 chemical sedative rounds, for riot control and non-lethal takedowns
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagOpium_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 medicinal opium rounds, prevents targets from using morphine to save themselves
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagSufforin_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Sufforin toxin rounds, accumulates Sufforin in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagMorbusine_VG: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Morbusine toxin rounds, accumulates Morbusine in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagCyanide_VGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Cyanide toxin rounds, accumulates Cyanide in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagCalyx_VGM: .45 SMG extended magazine carrying small amount of Velonaceps Calyx eggs. Less efficient than direct injection, but can still spread infection
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagPhysicorium_: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Physicorium AP rounds, exceptional armor penetration
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagDementonite_: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Dementonite gravity rounds, causes deep tissue damage and induces psychosis
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagIncendium_VG: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Incendium HE rounds, tissue damage comparable to small grenades
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgLongMagFulgurium_VG: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 Fulgurium shock rounds, quickly incapacitates targets
infotexts.entitydescription.smgDFuelLongMagVGM: SMG extended magazine loaded with .45 depleted fuel rounds, causes radiation damage and effectively penetrates armor
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptySmgDrumMag_VGM: An empty SMG drum magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.smgDrummagVGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 FMJ rounds, provides maximum ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagBlank_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagJHP_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 JHP rounds, excellent against unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagAP_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 AP rounds, can penetrate light armor
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagExp_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 explosive rounds, can be used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagChloralhydra: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 chemical sedative rounds, for riot control and non-lethal takedowns
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagOpium_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 medicinal opium rounds, prevents targets from using morphine to save themselves
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagSufforin_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Sufforin toxin rounds, accumulates Sufforin in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagMorbusine_VG: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Morbusine toxin rounds, accumulates Morbusine in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagCyanide_VGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Cyanide toxin rounds, accumulates Cyanide in targets
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagCalyx_VGM: .45 SMG drum magazine carrying small amount of Velonaceps Calyx eggs. Less efficient than direct injection, but can still spread infection
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagPhysicorium_: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Physicorium AP rounds, exceptional armor penetration
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagDementonite_: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Dementonite gravity rounds, causes deep tissue damage and induces psychosis
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagIncendium_VG: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Incendium HE rounds, tissue damage comparable to small grenades
infotexts.entitydescription.SmgDrumMagFulgurium_VG: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 Fulgurium shock rounds, quickly incapacitates targets
infotexts.entitydescription.smgDFuelDrumMagVGM: SMG drum magazine loaded with .45 depleted fuel rounds, causes radiation damage and effectively penetrates armor
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptyAssaultMag_VGM: An empty assault rifle magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagBlank_VGM: Assault rifle magazine loaded with 6.8mm blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.assaultriflemagazine: Assault rifle magazine loaded with 6.8mm FMJ rounds, the most basic ammunition configuration
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagJHP_VGM: Assault rifle magazine loaded with 6.8mm JHP rounds, excellent against unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagAP_VGM: Assault rifle magazine loaded with 6.8mm AP rounds, can penetrate light armor
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagExp_VGM: Assault rifle magazine loaded with 6.8mm explosive rounds, can be used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagRev_VGM: Assault rifle magazine loaded with 6.8mm overpressure rounds. WARNING: These rounds cause irreversible damage to the rifle
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptyAssaultMagLong_VG: An empty assault rifle extended magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagLongBlank_VG: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.assaultriflemagazinelo: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm FMJ rounds, provides increased ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagLongJHP_VGM: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm JHP rounds, excellent against unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagLongAP_VGM: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm AP rounds, can penetrate light armor
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagLongExp_VGM: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm explosive rounds, can be used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagLongRev_VGM: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm overpressure rounds. WARNING: These rounds cause irreversible damage to the rifle
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptyAssaultMagDrum_VG: An empty assault rifle drum magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagDrumBlank_VG: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.assaultriflemagazinedr: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm FMJ rounds, provides maximum ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagDrumJHP_VGM: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm JHP rounds, excellent against unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagDrumAP_VGM: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm AP rounds, can penetrate light armor
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagDrumExp_VGM: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm explosive rounds, can be used for breaching structures
infotexts.entitydescription.AssaultMagDrumRev_VGM: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm overpressure rounds. WARNING: These rounds cause irreversible damage to the rifle
infotexts.entitydescription.assaultrifleDrumMagVGM: Assault rifle drum magazine loaded with 6.8mm FMJ rounds, provides maximum ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.assaultrifleLongMagVGM: Assault rifle extended magazine loaded with 6.8mm FMJ rounds, provides increased ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptyHmgMag_VGM: An empty heavy machine gun magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagBlank_VGM: Heavy machine gun magazine loaded with 5.56mm blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagJHP_VGM: Heavy machine gun magazine loaded with 5.56mm JHP rounds, suitable for engaging cluster targets
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagAP_VGM: Heavy machine gun magazine loaded with 5.56mm AP rounds, for suppressive fire
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagExp_VGM: Heavy machine gun magazine loaded with 5.56mm explosive rounds, for suppressive fire and breaching
infotexts.entityname.EmptyHmgMagDrum_VGM: Empty Heavy Machine Gun Drum Magazine
infotexts.entitydescription.EmptyHmgMagDrum_VGM: An empty heavy machine gun drum magazine, needs to be loaded with corresponding ammunition
infotexts.entitydescription.hmgDrumMagVGM: Heavy machine gun drum magazine loaded with 5.56mm FMJ rounds, provides maximum ammunition capacity
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagDrumBlank_VGM: Heavy machine gun drum magazine loaded with 5.56mm blanks, for drills and training
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagDrumJHP_VGM: Heavy machine gun drum magazine loaded with 5.56mm JHP rounds, suitable for engaging cluster targets
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagDrumAP_VGM: Heavy machine gun drum magazine loaded with 5.56mm AP rounds, for suppressive fire
infotexts.entitydescription.HmgMagDrumExp_VGM: Heavy machine gun drum magazine loaded with 5.56mm explosive rounds, for suppressive fire and breaching
infotexts.entitydescription.AmmoBox_VGM: A specialized box for storing handheld weapon ammunition, can hold over a thousand rounds. Features multiple compartments for easy ammunition organization
infotexts.entitydescription.NoRopeSpear_VGB: Standard spear without rope - can be shot at long range, but difficult to retrieve if missed
infotexts.entitydescription.ToolSpear_VGB: Spear with fixture and firing pin - activates loaded items on impact\nCan load many things: from flares to explosives, but not all items can be triggered by spear impact
infotexts.entitydescription.12gBirdShot_VGB: Contains 16 small pellets. Low single-shot damage but wide coverage, suitable for small fast creatures and unarmored targets
infotexts.entitydescription.12gDestructionShot_VGB: Breaching-specialized 12G birdshot using fragments instead of pellets - can blast through standard security doors in two shots. Not suitable for engaging creatures
infotexts.entitydescription.12gArrowShot_VGB: Contains 5 heavy arrow-shaped pellets. Enhances armor penetration at the cost of fewer pellets
infotexts.entitydescription.12gRaptorKiller_VGB: 12G arrow shot designed against raptors, coated with raptor essence
infotexts.entitydescription.12gCalyxKiller_VGB: Arrow shot designed against Velonaceps Calyx, coated with Calyxanide.\nCan also be used to treat Calyx infestation - of course, the method involves shooting yourself.
infotexts.entitydescription.12gFlashShot_VGB: 12-gauge flash round - non-lethal ammunition causing blindness and sensory overload. Suitable for riot control and temporary escape
infotexts.entitydescription.12gFlareShot_VGB: Flare round launched from shotgun, emits yellow flash
infotexts.entitydescription.12gDragonShot_VGB: 12G shotgun round loaded with flammable material - can efficiently start fires or ignite others
infotexts.subcategory.VGB: Vanilla Weapon Modification (VGM) Pack #1 - Vanilla Ammo Expansion
